description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fix the issue where reading clipboard content in-game returns empty.  
2. Fix the issue where log redirection errors prevent some error logs from being captured.  
3. Fix the issue where the function remains enabled after canceling the dialog when forcing resolution settings.  
4. Add the ability to invert gyroscope direction.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复游戏内剪贴板读取内容为空的问题
2.修复日志重定向错误导致无法获取部分错误日志的问题
3.修复强制设置分辨率时取消对话框后功能仍然开启的问题
4.增加反转陀螺仪方向的功能
